content.body:
Extends TreeSitterASTExtractor with JVM/CLR OOP grammar support. Java
extracts class/interface/enum declarations and method declarations. C#
extracts class/interface/record/enum declarations and method declarations.

Fixtures: sample.java, sample.cs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add Java and C# AST extraction
